examples: The final stage, putrefaction and decay, a! Lasts longest.
Putrefaction refers to the breaking down and gradual liquefaction of tissue by bacteria.
All through my childhood, Kurast was a paradise. The once perfumed air now reeks of putrefaction.
Bacteria which produce putrefaction and gas in the intestines cannot live in lactic acid.
"In this case, due to advanced putrefaction of the tissue, no cyanide was detected" after the exhumation.
